properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: He will hold me fast, He will hold me fast; For my Saviour loves me so, He will hold me fast.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: For my life He bled and died, Christ will hold me fast; Justice has been satisfied; He will hold me fast. Raised with Him to endless life, He will hold me fast ‘Till our faith is turned to sight, When He comes at last!
